programme.title: Live: NBA Summer League Basketball
programme.desc: From Thomas & Mack Center in Las Vegas.

programme.title: Live: NBA Summer League Basketball
programme.desc: From Thomas & Mack Center in Las Vegas.

programme.title: Live: SportsCenter
programme.desc: The latest news, highlights and inside information from every corner of the sports world is presented each day on "SportsCenter," ESPN's first-ever program when the network debuted in September of 1979. The flagship series airs an evening edition and a brand new midnight show each weekday before the stage is cleared for a live "SportsCenter" morning block that emphasizes fast-paced, highlights-dri

programme.title: SportsCenter
programme.desc: The latest news, highlights and inside information from every corner of the sports world is presented each day on "SportsCenter," ESPN's first-ever program when the network debuted in September of 1979. The flagship series airs an evening edition and a brand new midnight show each weekday before the stage is cleared for a live "SportsCenter" morning block that emphasizes fast-paced, highlights-dri

programme.title: Live: SportsCenter
programme.desc: The latest news, highlights and inside information from every corner of the sports world is presented each day on "SportsCenter," ESPN's first-ever program when the network debuted in September of 1979. The flagship series airs an evening edition and a brand new midnight show each weekday before the stage is cleared for a live "SportsCenter" morning block that emphasizes fast-paced, highlights-dri

programme.title: Live: Get Up
programme.desc: ESPN's morning show features host Mike Greenberg with a rotating and diverse group of analysts opining about and analyzing the latest news from the world of sports. The two-hour, personality-driven show originates from Hudson Square in Lower Manhattan, a modern media hub for ESPN and The Walt Disney Company's New York-based teams. Greenberg, aka "Greeny," is formerly one-half of ESPN Radio's longt

programme.title: Live: First Take
programme.desc: Stephen A. Smith hosts this weekday morning sports debate show. Smith provides his expert takes on the day's trending sports topics and under-the-radar news. They're regularly joined by veteran analysts and the top guests in sports and entertainment.

programme.title: Live: The Pat McAfee Show
programme.desc: Former NFL punter Pat McAfee brings his humor and candor to the microphone to highlight the day's top stories.

programme.title: Live: SportsCenter
programme.desc: The latest news, highlights and inside information from every corner of the sports world is presented each day on "SportsCenter," ESPN's first-ever program when the network debuted in September of 1979. The flagship series airs an evening edition and a brand new midnight show each weekday before the stage is cleared for a live "SportsCenter" morning block that emphasizes fast-paced, highlights-dri

programme.title: Live: NBA Today
programme.desc: In-depth, comprehensive daily coverage of all aspects of the NBA from expert analysts.

programme.title: NFL Live
programme.desc: Host Laura Rutledge takes the helm of this weekday show featuring the likes of Marcus Spears, Dan Orlovsky, Mina Kimes, and Adam Schefter. The "NFL Live" crew entertains fans while offering all the latest news and analysis from across the NFL.

programme.title: Live: SportsCenter
programme.desc: The latest news, highlights and inside information from every corner of the sports world is presented each day on "SportsCenter," ESPN's first-ever program when the network debuted in September of 1979. The flagship series airs an evening edition and a brand new midnight show each weekday before the stage is cleared for a live "SportsCenter" morning block that emphasizes fast-paced, highlights-dri

programme.title: Live: Pardon the Interruption
programme.desc: The debate is the story in this fast-paced, half-hour series hosted by former Washington Post sportswriters Tony Kornheiser and Michael Wilbon. The pair engage in high-energy discussions, conduct interviews and often argue over topics not even related to sports. Other sports reporters appear as guests and offer opinions on the top stories of the day.

programme.title: Live: SportsCenter
programme.desc: The latest news, highlights and inside information from every corner of the sports world is presented each day on "SportsCenter," ESPN's first-ever program when the network debuted in September of 1979. The flagship series airs an evening edition and a brand new midnight show each weekday before the stage is cleared for a live "SportsCenter" morning block that emphasizes fast-paced, highlights-dri

programme.title: Live: NBA Summer League Basketball
programme.desc: From Cox Pavilion in Las Vegas, Nev.

programme.title: Live: One Day International Cricket
programme.desc: West Indies v New Zealand. Coverage of the second ODI in the five-match series from Providence Cricket Stadium in Guyana. The visitors have won the last three series in this format against the West Indies and have also won eight of their last nine ODI's against them. They last met in a three-game series in New Zealand in November last year, with the Kiwi's winning all three matches.

programme.title: World Superbike Highlights
programme.desc: Action from the eighth round of the season at Donington Park Circuit.

programme.desc: West Indies v New Zealand. Action from the second ODI in the five-match series from Providence Cricket Stadium in Guyana.

programme.desc: Action from the first round of the season in Phillip Island.

programme.desc: Action from the second round of the season at Sydney Motorsport Park.

programme.title: Australian Superbike Championship Highlights
programme.desc: Action from the third round of the season at The Bend Motorsport Park.

programme.title: Australian Superbike Championship Highlights
programme.desc: Action from the fourth round of the season at Morgan Park Raceway.

programme.title: One Day International Cricket
programme.desc: West Indies v New Zealand. Action from the second ODI in the five-match series from Providence Cricket Stadium in Guyana.

programme.title: Spirit of Yachting
programme.desc: A special look at the Rolex TP52 World Championship.

programme.title: Endurance Uncovered: Racing for Excellence
programme.desc: A special look at the World Endurance Championship, a global series of races that test the limits of both drivers and vehicles.

programme.title: Ultimate Pool
programme.desc: Action from the Group 4 matches in the Champions League tournament, as four players competed in a series of round-robin matches to earn a place in the Super 8's.

programme.title: One Day International Cricket
programme.desc: West Indies v New Zealand. Action from the second ODI in the five-match series from Providence Cricket Stadium in Guyana.

programme.title: Tour de France Men Highlights
programme.desc: Action from the 10th stage of the race.

programme.title: NWSL
programme.desc: Utah Royals FC v Gotham FC.

programme.title: Major League Fishing All Angles
programme.desc: All Angles inside look at the MLF Team Series 2025 Challenge Cup Knockout Match 1 with angler commentary.

programme.title: A Fishing Story With Ronnie Green
programme.desc: Veteran angler Ronnie Green shares his passion for fishing and celebrating the small things in life with entertaining guests who share their inspiring fish tales.

programme.title: Pure Outdoor
programme.desc: Outdoor sports from all over the world, from freestyle ski jumping to airplane aerobatics.

programme.title: Offroad Odyssey
programme.desc: Adrenaline-pumping action, breathtaking scenery, and unforgettable encounter off-road.

programme.title: She's in the Game
programme.desc: Meet the next generation of superstar female athletes around the country as we go behind the scenes to shine the light on them and their interests off the field, along with catching up with the female legends who paved the way for all this growth.

programme.title: Sports Stars of Tomorrow
programme.desc: Profiles of the top rookie, college and high-school talent in sports; current athletes share their experiences, advice and personal impressions of the road to stardom.

programme.title: The Short List
programme.desc: The sports countdown, featuring iconic themes focused upon the memorable moments and individuals in sports; the 10 memorable debuts, the 10 revered innovators, the comebacks of all time and much more.

programme.title: Invincible
programme.desc: Periods of unrivaled domination in sport, including chapters from sport's greatest careers and iconic dynasties.

programme.title: The Iconic
programme.desc: Stories behind celebrated events, institutions, clubs, players, rivalries and moments in sport.

programme.title: Behind the A
programme.desc: Taking viewers behind the scenes of a Colorado Avalanche game day at Ball Arena, revealing the preparation and coordination required from players, coaches, and staff before puck drop.

programme.title: Fairways of Life
programme.desc: New York Times's Best Seller and Golf Channel Host Matt Adams provides unforgettable interviews with golf's legends and stars, as well as lively interactive discussions about the game, travel and the latest in golf equipment.

programme.title: Swing Clinic With Jimmy Hanlin
programme.desc: Golf tips, strategy and review of products.

programme.title: Golf Life
programme.desc: Featuring the latest trends, tours of the finest courses and tips from golf experts.

programme.title: Golfing the World
programme.desc: Highlighting golf courses and private resorts from around the world.

programme.title: RateEscape: Stop Overpaying For Cellular
programme.desc: Cut up to half the cost of your monthly cell phone bill; same towers, same coverage, but a lot less money; it sounds great but is it too good to be true?; join myth-busting legend Kari Byron as she takes on Big Wireless to save you money.

programme.title: Tired of Pain? Go Drug-Free
programme.desc: See how a drug-free patch is helping people find relief-without medication.

programme.title: RateEscape: Stop Overpaying For Cellular
programme.desc: Cut up to half the cost of your monthly cell phone bill; same towers, same coverage, but a lot less money; it sounds great but is it too good to be true?; join myth-busting legend Kari Byron as she takes on Big Wireless to save you money.

programme.title: Tired of Pain? Go Drug-Free
programme.desc: See how a drug-free patch is helping people find relief-without medication.

programme.title: Ready for a safer shower? Enjoy a one-day bath remodel with Jacuzzi.
programme.desc: Trusted brand Jacuzzi Bath Remodel and interior designer Christina Hall share their secrets on how you can easily and affordably transform your bathroom into a gorgeous custom, safe, stylish space in 1 day! Call for a FREE quote & installation.

programme.title: Tired of Pain? Go Drug-Free
programme.desc: See how a drug-free patch is helping people find relief-without medication.

programme.title: Live: Moser, Lombardi & Kane on Altitude Radio 92.5
Live: Moser, Lombardi & Kane on Altitude Radio 92.5
Live: Moser, Lombardi & Kane on Altitude Radio 92.5
Denver's Next Great Neighborhood
programme.desc: The Ball Arena Redevelopment Project is a bold reimagining of how we live, work, and play downtown. We will hear from the visionaries, builders, and believers on how this will transform our city and become Denver's Next Great Neighborhood.

programme.title: Altitude Extra
programme.desc: Vic Lombardi sits down with Coach Prime to discuss his recent diagnosis with bladder cancer, how his other health struggles led to that diagnosis and how his faith helps him manage his day-to-day responsibilities.

programme.title: Moser, Lombardi & Kane on Altitude Radio 92.5
Major League Fishing All Angles
programme.desc: All Angles inside look at the MLF Team Series 2025 Challenge Cup Knockout Match 1 with angler commentary.

programme.title: A Fishing Story With Ronnie Green
programme.desc: Veteran angler Ronnie Green shares his passion for fishing and celebrating the small things in life with entertaining guests who share their inspiring fish tales.

programme.title: Pure Outdoor
programme.desc: Outdoor sports from all over the world, from freestyle ski jumping to airplane aerobatics.

programme.title: World Class Championship Boxing
programme.desc: Boxing action.

programme.title: Courtside
programme.desc: Tennis highlights from recent matches.

programme.title: Courtside
programme.desc: Tennis highlights from recent matches.

programme.title: Courtside - Live
programme.desc: Coverage of professional tennis matches.

programme.title: Courtside
programme.desc: Tennis highlights from recent matches.

programme.title: 30 for 30
programme.desc: The University of Miami's football program tries to recover from the devastation left by NCAA sanctions and scandals.

programme.title: ACC Huddle
programme.desc: ACC Huddle, ACCN's signature football show, airs on Saturday mornings this fall. Host Kelsey Riggs and analysts Eric Mac Lain, EJ Manuel, Mark Richt, and Eddie Royal go on the road to preview the weekend's slate of ACC football games.

programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: The No. 22 Tigers (3-0, 0-0 SEC) and No. 11 Sooners (3-0, 0-0) kick off their conference slates. Last season, in their first meeting since the 2017 Sugar Bowl, Oklahoma beat Auburn 27-21. Sooners linebacker Kip Lewis grabbed a pick-six in the win.

programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: The No. 5 Sooners host the Golden Flashes. Oklahoma quarterback John Mateer, an early Heisman Trophy candidate, had surgery for a broken bone in his right hand Sept. 25, and will miss up to a month. Michael Hawkins Jr. starts at QB for the Sooners.

programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: The undefeated No. 6 Sooners (5-0, 1-0 SEC) face the Longhorns (3-2, 0-1) in another edition of the Red River Rivalry from the Cotton Bowl. Texas, the preseason No. 1, fell from the AP Top 25 after dropping its SEC opener 29-21 at Florida on Oct. 4.

programme.title: Live: Unsportsmanlike with Evan, Canty and Michelle
programme.desc: Start the day off right with Chris Canty, Evan Cohen and Michelle Smallmon providing an energizing and informative way to take on the day. Sports, life and laughter are what it's all about.

programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: The Gamecocks host the No. 14 Sooners. Quarterback LaNorris Sellers threw for 175 yards and a touchdown as South Carolina stunned Oklahoma 35-9 in the Sooner State last year. Oklahoma comes off its first loss of the season in the Red River Rivalry.

programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: The No. 8 Rebels seek a bounce-back performance against the No. 13 Sooners. Ole Miss comes off a 43-35 setback to then-No. 9 Georgia on Oct. 18. Oklahoma put its Red River Rivalry loss in the rearview by beating South Carolina, 26-7 that same day.

programme.title: 30 for 30
programme.desc: North Carolina State, coached by Jim Valvano, was a huge underdog in the 1983 NCAA Final vs. top-ranked Houston - resulting in one of the greatest college basketball upsets ever.

programme.title: ACC Huddle
programme.desc: ACC Huddle, ACCN's signature football show, airs on Saturday mornings this fall. Host Kelsey Riggs and analysts Eric Mac Lain, EJ Manuel, Mark Richt, and Eddie Royal go on the road to preview the weekend's slate of ACC football games.

programme.title: 30 for 30
programme.desc: The fascinating backstory behind the famous/infamous 1988 "Catholics vs. Convicts" college football game between Notre Dame and the University of Miami. The slogan summarized the subtext of cultural and racial tensions brewing between the schools.

programme.title: European Le Mans Series Highlights
programme.desc: The 4 Hours of Imola. Action from the third round of the season, which took place at Autodromo Internazionale Enzo e Dino Ferrari in Italy.

programme.title: MotoGP
programme.desc: Action from MotoGP Grand Prix of Germany.

programme.title: The WRC Magazine
programme.desc: Action from Rally Estonia.

programme.title: Endurance Uncovered: Racing for Excellence
programme.desc: A special look at the World Endurance Championship, a global series of races that test the limits of both drivers and vehicles.

programme.title: UFC Reloaded
programme.desc: A look back at UFC 207 from December 2016 in Las Vegas, featuring the enthralling headline bout between Ronda Rousey and Amanda Nunes.

programme.title: UFC Fight Flashback
programme.desc: Dustin Poirier v Dan Hooker from June 2020.

programme.title: UFC Fight Flashback
programme.desc: A look back at Stipe Miocic v Daniel Cormier from UFC 252 in 2020.

programme.title: Formula E Flashback
programme.desc: A look back at the 2021 Valencia Grand Prix.

programme.desc: Utah Royals FC v Gotham FC.

programme.title: NWSL
programme.desc: Seattle Reign v Portland Thorns.

programme.desc: Action from the women's elite cross country short track race, which takes place in Pal Arinsal, Andorra.

programme.title: MLB
programme.desc: Action from the 2026 Home Run Derby.

programme.title: UEFA Champions League - Classics
programme.desc: We revisit the 2010/11 UEFA Champions League quarter-final second leg between Man Utd and Chelsea at Old Trafford. Wayne Rooney's strike gave United a slender 1-0 first leg win.

programme.title: AFL
programme.desc: Fremantle Dockers v Sydney Swans.

programme.desc: Collingwood Magpies v North Melbourne Kangaroos.

programme.desc: St Kilda Saints v Port Adelaide Power.

programme.desc: GWS Giants v Geelong Cats.

programme.desc: Carlton Blues v Hawthorn Hawks.

programme.title: TBL Team Boxing League
programme.desc: Professional boxing with team's fighters competing in individual one round contests.

programme.title: Fight Sports Martial Arts
programme.desc: Coverage of judo, sumo, karate and other disciplines of martial arts.

programme.title: Fight Sports: Boxing
programme.desc: Replays of classic boxing matches.

programme.title: Fight Sports MMA
programme.desc: Check out exciting action from MMA organizations around the world. This episode features main event Dricus Stillknocks Du Plessis vs. Brendan Lesar in the Middleweight Championship from EFC 83 in Pretoria, South Africa.

programme.title: Fight Sports: World Championship Kickboxing
programme.desc: Competitions in kickboxing and Muay Thai.

programme.title: Fight Sports: Grand Sumo
programme.desc: Show 1 featuring Kakuryu, Ikioi, Endo and Yutakayama from the Aki basho, 2018.

programme.title: Fight Sports: Grand Sumo
programme.desc: This new format presents Sumo in an authentic, in-depth and entertaining way covering the rules, ranks, match-ups, and more. From Tokyo, Ryogoku Kokugikan, Show 2.

programme.title: A Fishing Story With Ronnie Green
programme.desc: We journey to the beautiful island of Jamaica to explore its vibrant culture, stunning waters, and local charm through the eyes of Deryk Meany, the General Manager at Sandals.

programme.title: Pirates Classics
programme.desc: The Bucs complete back-to-back walk-off wins against the Cubs. May 25, 2008.

programme.title: Best Mattress Topper Ever!
programme.desc: Back Pain? Hip? Sleep well thanks to this cooling topper!

programme.desc: From June 13, 1997.

programme.title: Pirates Classics
programme.desc: John Candelaria throws no-hitter. From Aug. 9, 1976.

programme.title: Pirates Classics
programme.desc: A Pirates Classic game featuring big hits from David Parker and Willie Stargell, from July 11th, 1979.

programme.title: Fair Territory with Ken Rosenthal
programme.desc: MLB insider Ken Rosenthal covers baseball's latest news and pressing issues.

programme.desc: The Atlanta Dream face Los Angeles Sparks in the WNBA.

programme.title: Live WNBA: Mercury @ Lynx
programme.desc: The Minnesota Lynx take on the Phoenix Mercury in the WNBA.

programme.title: World Cup Report
programme.desc: A comprehensive round-up of all the day's World Cup news.

programme.title: World Cup Breakfast
programme.desc: A round-up of the all the breaking news stories from the 2026 FIFA World Cup, with live analysis and comment plus interviews with the headline makers.

programme.title: Open: Last-Chance Qualifier Hlts
programme.desc: For 12 hopefuls, one place remains in the 154th Open. Over 18 holes at Royal Birkdale, catch up on all the highlights from the last-chance qualifier.

programme.title: Live The Open: At The Range
programme.desc: Ahead of the 154th Open Championship, join some of the game's leading stars and pundits live from the practice range of this year's venue - Royal Birkdale.

programme.title: Live 1st ODI: England v India
programme.desc: India's white-ball tour of England continues at Edgbaston with the opening ODI in a three-match series. Harry Brook's men carry momentum from victory in the T20I series just gone.

programme.title: World Cup Report
programme.desc: A comprehensive round-up of all the day's World Cup news.

programme.title: UEFA Champions League - Classics
programme.desc: We rewind back to the thrilling first leg of the 2000/01 UEFA Champions League quarter-final between Leeds United and reigning Spanish champions Deportivo La Coruna at Elland Road.

programme.title: UEFA Champions League - Classics
programme.desc: We revisit the 2001/02 UEFA Champions League group stage tie between Feyenoord and Newcastle in Rotterdam. The Toon had to win to secure a place in the competition's second phase.

programme.title: UEFA Champions League - Classics
programme.desc: We revisit the second leg of the 2003/04 UEFA Champions League quarter-final between Deportivo La Coruna and AC Milan at the Riazor Stadium. Milan led 4-0 from the first leg.

programme.title: UEFA Champions League - Classics
programme.desc: We revisit the 2004/05 UEFA Champions League group stage tie between Manchester United and Fenerbahce at Old Trafford. The match saw Wayne Rooney make his highly anticipated debut.

programme.title: UEFA Champions League - Classics
programme.desc: We revisit the semi-final second leg from the 2008/09 UEFA Champions League between Arsenal and Manchester United. John O'Shea's goal had given United a 1-0 first leg advantage.

programme.desc: Northampton Saints v Newcastle Red Bulls.

programme.title: Live: Baseball Night in N.Y.

programme.title: Canyon of Heroes
programme.desc: An original SNY documentary that looks into the unique history of New York City's ticker-tape parades as they celebrated along Broadway, focusing on the major championship celebrations in 1994 and 1986.

programme.title: High Stakes Poker

programme.title: High Stakes Poker
programme.desc: Andrew Robl continues to chase being the session's biggest winner; after being stacked by Robl, Charles Yu chips away at his losses; Jean-Robert Bellande turns his luck around.

programme.title: High Stakes Poker
programme.desc: After a season away, Jason Koon is back on "High Stakes Poker"; Farah Galfond and Matt Berkey make their debut in this $200/$400 No-Limit Hold'em cash game.

programme.title: Major League Fishing's Bass Pro Tour
programme.desc: 2025 Heavy Hitters Qualifying Group A Day 1 from Smith Mountain Lake in Franklin County, VA. Anglers compete to advance as well as $10,000 Big Bass Bonus.

programme.title: Ultimate Match Fishing
programme.desc: Jonathan VanDam and David Dudley clash.

programme.title: The VanDam Experience
programme.desc: Kevin VanDam shares the boat with longtime B.A.S.S. Trip Weldon on his home waters in Alabama.

programme.title: Catching Bass With Dustin Wilks
programme.desc: Accomplished angler Dustin Wilks fishes various bass fishing locations and teaches how to find and catch more fish. Loaded with fish catches, Catching Bass with Dustin Wilks is a show that is action packed and shows the viewer numerous techniques for catching bass. Dustin's straight forward approach coupled with his whimsical demeanor makes Catching Bass with Dustin Wilks the perfect teaching plat

programme.title: JT Kenney's Florida Bass
programme.desc: JT Kenney heads to one of the greatest fisheries in the U.S. - Headwaters Lake.

programme.title: Major League Fishing's Bass Pro Tour
programme.desc: 2025 Heavy Hitters Qualifying Group A Day 1 from Smith Mountain Lake in Franklin County, VA. Anglers compete to advance as well as $10,000 Big Bass Bonus.

programme.desc: Jonathan VanDam and David Dudley clash.

programme.title: The VanDam Experience
programme.desc: Kevin VanDam shares the boat with longtime B.A.S.S. Trip Weldon on his home waters in Alabama.

programme.title: Catching Bass With Dustin Wilks
programme.desc: Accomplished angler Dustin Wilks fishes various bass fishing locations and teaches how to find and catch more fish. Dustin's straight forward approach coupled with his whimsical demeanor makes Catching Bass with Dustin Wilks the perfect teaching plat

programme.title: JT Kenney's Florida Bass
programme.desc: JT Kenney heads to one of the greatest fisheries in the U.S. - Headwaters Lake.

programme.title: Major League Fishing's Bass Pro Tour
programme.desc: 2025 Heavy Hitters Qualifying Group A Day 1 from Smith Mountain Lake in Franklin County, VA. Anglers compete to advance as well as $10,000 Big Bass Bonus.

programme.title: Ultimate Match Fishing

programme.title: The VanDam Experience
programme.desc: Kevin VanDam shares the boat with longtime B.A.S.S. Trip Weldon on his home waters in Alabama.

programme.title: Fly Fusion
programme.desc: It's difficult to find places where the water runs cold and clear and where the human footprint is nearly non-existent; Jim, Derek and Paula helicopter into one of these places, and what they find exceeds their expectation.

programme.title: The New Fly Fisher
programme.desc: Jeff Parks is in Northern Ontario at Flint Wilderness Lodge targeting big eastern brook trout.

programme.title: Wild Game Cooking With Chef Rupert
programme.desc: We visit Chef Zach Keeshig of Naagan in Owen Sound where he shows us how he prepares his smoked pigeon with magnolia and birch glaze.

programme.title: Vintage Vessels
programme.desc: Peter Breen showcases his collection of boats in his cottage showroom and takes them out on the water; featured boats include a restored 1911 Mullins and a 1929 Peterborough Launch.

programme.title: Gary Cooper's Fishing Diary
programme.desc: Al Jenkins and Mike Denski fish the surf for Chinooks out of Esperanza Inlet.

programme.title: Westcoast Sporting Journal
programme.desc: Sight fishing Striped Marlin In Cabo with Jody Thompson.

programme.title: BC Outdoors Sportfishing
programme.desc: Mike Mitchell closes out the NHL Enforcers alumni derby at Shearwater Resort with Colin Patterson, Brent Ashton and Lindsay Carson.

programme.title: Fishing the Rock
programme.desc: Join host Kastine Coleman as she snorkels for scallops with Explore Newfoundland in Newfoundland & Labrador.

programme.title: Fly Fusion
programme.desc: It's difficult to find places where the water runs cold and clear and where the human footprint is nearly non-existent; Jim, Derek and Paula helicopter into one of these places, and what they find exceeds their expectation.

programme.title: The New Fly Fisher
programme.desc: Jeff Parks is in Northern Ontario at Flint Wilderness Lodge targeting big eastern brook trout.

programme.desc: We visit Chef Zach Keeshig of Naagan in Owen Sound where he shows us how he prepares his smoked pigeon with magnolia and birch glaze.

programme.desc: Peter Breen showcases his collection of boats in his cottage showroom and takes them out on the water; featured boats include a restored 1911 Mullins and a 1929 Peterborough Launch.

programme.title: Fly Fusion
programme.desc: It's difficult to find places where the water runs cold and clear and where the human footprint is nearly non-existent; Jim, Derek and Paula helicopter into one of these places, and what they find exceeds their expectation.

programme.title: The New Fly Fisher
programme.desc: Jeff Parks is in Northern Ontario at Flint Wilderness Lodge targeting big eastern brook trout.

programme.title: Wild Game Cooking With Chef Rupert
programme.desc: We visit Chef Zach Keeshig of Naagan in Owen Sound where he shows us how he prepares his smoked pigeon with magnolia and birch glaze.

programme.title: Vintage Vessels
programme.desc: Peter Breen showcases his collection of boats in his cottage showroom and takes them out on the water; featured boats include a restored 1911 Mullins and a 1929 Peterborough Launch.

programme.title: Gary Cooper's Fishing Diary
programme.desc: Al Jenkins and Mike Denski fish the surf for Chinooks out of Esperanza Inlet.

programme.title: Westcoast Sporting Journal
programme.desc: Sight fishing Striped Marlin In Cabo with Jody Thompson.

programme.title: BC Outdoors Sportfishing
programme.desc: Mike Mitchell closes out the NHL Enforcers alumni derby at Shearwater Resort with Colin Patterson, Brent Ashton and Lindsay Carson.

programme.title: Fishing the Rock
programme.desc: Join host Kastine Coleman as she snorkels for scallops with Explore Newfoundland in Newfoundland & Labrador.

programme.title: Let's Fish TV
programme.desc: Let's Fish TV is a weekly look at fishing in the Southern U.S. The program features both fresh and saltwater fishing for most southern species, and gives tips on where and how to catch the most popular game fish in the region.

programme.title: Arkansas Great Outdoors
programme.desc: Fort Smith hosts Pradco Outdoors creating lures which make great fishing memories. We tour and test the products! And Leigh's bluegrass tour continues.

programme.title: Fishing the Midwest
programme.desc: Lake Oahe and Lake Sharpe produce outstanding summer walleye fishing on this episode of Fishing the Midwest.

programme.title: Angling Edge Adventures
programme.desc: Angling Edge Adventures puts destination fishing front and center, traveling to world-class waters across the Midwest and Canada. Hosted by the Lindner team, each episode highlights outstanding fisheries while showing anglers how to break down new water and capitalize on peak seasonal opportunities. Grounded in the proven Angling Edge approach, the series blends travel, exploration, and real-world

programme.title: Facts of Fishing
programme.desc: Dave hunts for giant smallmouth on the St. Lawrence River, but he's fishing a bite that most people avoid.

programme.title: Winchester Deadly Passion
programme.desc: Winchester Deadly Passion is a show that will keep the viewer on the edge of their seat with hardcore style hunting mixed with Melissa's genuine and fun-loving personality.

programme.title: Hoge Wild
programme.desc: Hoge Wild is an exhilarating adventure TV series that follows the charismatic country music artist and host, Lucas Hoge, as he embarks on thrilling escapades around the world. With a passion for music, hunting, fishing, and scuba diving, Lucas Hoge brings a unique blend of talents to the screen. Viewers are taken on a wild ride as Lucas explores diverse landscapes, from rugged mountains to crystal

programme.title: The Hunter's Quest
programme.desc: Hunter and his good buddy, Casey Richmond from Eberlestock, get dropped by bush plane into the Alaskan wilderness on the Caribou hunt of a lifetime.

programme.title: The Western Hunter
programme.desc: The Western Hunter documents the journeys of public land hunters out West. The stories unfold in some of the most wild and beautiful settings on the continent in pursuit of big game.

programme.title: Art of Wild
programme.desc: Art of wild is a film series that aims to tell stories about the wild in the most cinematic way possible. To tell the best stories we travel to the most incredible places. It is in the wild places where most won't go that the human spirit is fed. Only a hunter knows what it's like to wake up with the woods, or hear a bull bugle in the graylight, these moments are what make up the beauty of the wil

programme.title: Into High Country
programme.desc: Into High Country seeks to capture the most compelling and wide array of authentic hunting adventures from the most epic landscapes the Western U.S. and North America have to offer. Featured is a wide array of bow and rifle hunts for big game such as elk, mule deer, black bear, moose, pronghorn, and many more incredible and fascinating wild animal species.

programme.title: Jim Shockey's Shock Therapy
programme.desc: Jim sits down with Jack Zimmerman to share his inspiring story of resilience, exploring how Jack continues to pursue hunting adventures around the world despite the challenges he faces as a double amputee veteran.

programme.title: Greg McHale's Wild Yukon
programme.desc: Greg and Kolter head into the high country late in the season, hoping to find a ram before winter fully sets in; the conditions are tough and time is short, but the experience is about more than just the outcome.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: Steve hunts for squirrels and rabbits with Guy Zuck and Kevin Murphy.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: Steve and Jason Phelps hunt for mule deer in Idaho.

programme.title: The Western Hunter
programme.desc: The Western Hunter documents the journeys of public land hunters out West. The stories unfold in some of the most wild and beautiful settings on the continent in pursuit of big game.

programme.title: Heartland Waterfowl
programme.desc: The Award-Winning Heartland Waterfowl is a team of men from the Midwest that travels across the US and Canada to film honest waterfowl hunting experiences. With a variety of personalities, these hunting buddies pursue waterfowl hunting with hard work and a dedication to scouting, while showcasing their efforts with the highest standard of production quality.

programme.title: Ducks Unlimited
programme.desc: DUTV Co-Host Fred Zink joins Kevin VanDam and his boys on the banks of the Neosho River in Kansas in the heart of the Central Flyway for a waterfowl experience that rekindles the values and the good that comes from spending time outdoors.

programme.title: Whitetail Fix
programme.desc: A team of God-loving individuals, from different walks of life, different backgrounds and different jobs that all share one common bond: The passion and desire to achieve their Whitetail Fix!

programme.title: Roger Raglin Outdoors
programme.desc: Join host Roger Raglin for one exciting whitetail adventure after another. Roger Raglin Outdoors features all big game but is predominantly whitetail hunting utilizing a variety of hunting methods: bow, rifle and black powder. As a true outdoorsman and an exceptional big game hunter, Roger shares a lifetime of tricks and techniques to help you in your quest for big game.

programme.title: The Wild Outdoors
programme.desc: Heading to Iowa in springtime to chase turkeys with Wyatt and Jay.

programme.title: Dead Meat
programme.desc: It's the bear opener in Minnesota and Buddy Toepfer has waited five years for the chance to shoot a big one; Buddy's got a buddy who just happens to have a bear or two on his property.

programme.title: Trijicon's World of Sports Afield
programme.desc: Hosted by international big game hunter Dave Fulson, Trijicon's World Of Sports Afield takes the viewer around the globe in search of big game adventure. From the rugged Yukon, to the windswept mountains of North America and Asia, to the great game fields of Africa, this series delivers world-class hunting in each episode!

programme.title: Hornady's Dark and Dangerous
programme.desc: Hornady's Dark & Dangerous is a bold series that documents the highs, lows, harsh realities and tangible risks always present on a fair chase, dangerous game safari into wild Africa. This features Africa's most recognized Professional Hunters who allow the Safari Classics camera crew unprecedented access into the world of real-time safari adventure. A unique editing style, featuring multiple hunts

programme.title: Big Deer TV
programme.desc: Three Purple Heart heroes join Mike and the Big Deer crew in Virginia. Part 2.

programme.title: Gun Stories
programme.desc: More than three decades after the Vietnam War, when the totals of modern American snipers were added up, it was discovered that one man had 103 confirmed kills and as many as 216 probable kills, more than any other Marine Corps sniper; host Joe Mantegna explores the life and accomplishments of Chuck Mawhinney.

programme.title: Jim Shockey's Hunting Adventures
programme.desc: Close range bow hunting in Old Mexico.

programme.title: Into High Country
programme.desc: Into High Country seeks to capture the most compelling and wide array of authentic hunting adventures from the most epic landscapes the Western U.S. and North America have to offer. Featured is a wide array of bow and rifle hunts for big game such as elk, mule deer, black bear, moose, pronghorn, and many more incredible and fascinating wild animal species.

programme.title: Wild Upland
programme.desc: Tanner Smedley heads to Wyoming for a waterfowl hunt in an unlikely place.

programme.title: Greg McHale's Wild Yukon
programme.desc: Greg and Kolter head into the high country late in the season, hoping to find a ram before winter fully sets in; the conditions are tough and time is short, but the experience is about more than just the outcome.

programme.title: Huntworx
programme.desc: Colbi Geis travels to remote Canada in search of a musk ox with nothing but his Hoyt bow in hand.

programme.title: The Western Hunter
programme.desc: The Western Hunter documents the journeys of public land hunters out West. The stories unfold in some of the most wild and beautiful settings on the continent in pursuit of big game.

programme.title: Ranch America
programme.desc: River Klass goes behind the scenes at the rodeo called the "Daddy of 'em All.".

programme.title: Everything Eichler
programme.desc: Fred Eichler takes viewers on thrilling bow and predator hunts, showcasing the complete field-to-table lifestyle alongside family, friends, and clients. As the host, Fred shares the daily trials of ranching, farming, and managing an outfitting business in Colorado. Expect extreme bowhunting and predator action, intertwined with the ups and downs of their authentic field-to-table journey.

programme.title: MOJO TV
programme.desc: Terry meets up with Get Ducks' Ramsey Russell for an unreal duck hunting adventure in Argentina.

programme.title: Reel Animals
programme.desc: Mike Fishes the beautiful waters of Clearwater, FL for Trout and Redfish.

programme.title: Big Water Angler
programme.desc: Big Water Angler takes viewers on an adventurous journey across the Great Lakes region and beyond, exploring the best fishing destinations, techniques, and insider tips from seasoned captains and guides.

programme.title: Legends of the Fall
programme.desc: Legends of the Fall is produced with truly die-hard deer hunters in mind. Legends of the Fall chronicles the high-energy hunts and behind-the-scenes action of a dedicated crew of passionate hunters. While the show spotlights a dynamic variety of adrenaline-pumping whitetail bow hunts across North America, it also offers a mix of other big game adventures. Each episode details the lives of all clan

programme.title: Big Deer TV
programme.desc: Three Purple Heart heroes join Mike and the Big Deer crew in Virginia. Part 2.

programme.title: Duck Camp Dinners
programme.desc: Chef and the crew head north to share camp with Brad Eldridge from Parish calls.

programme.title: Bob Redfern's Outdoor Magazine
programme.desc: Quail hunting with ladies behind the success of Southern Woods.

programme.title: American Made
programme.desc: Pete Roberts is the visionary behind Origin USA, a company uncompromising in its promise to produce 100% American made products; to keep his promise, Pete must challenge the idea that manufacturing must be done overseas.

programme.title: Whitetail Properties
programme.desc: Missouri Land Specialist Brock Utecht is a rock star in the land of plenty, using his positive attitude and servitude while in the field.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons
programme.desc: In a classic western, Clint Eastwood -- aka Blondie -- saves Eli Wallach from the hangman's noose three separate times by shooting and severing the rope that he hangs from; recreating each scene and testing the reality of those shots.

programme.title: Handguns
programme.desc: Steel targets provide immediate visual and auditory feedback, making them an excellent resource for handgun training.

programme.title: Our Way of Life
programme.desc: During the herring spawn, Mike continues the long tradition of passing down generational knowledge to Heather, ensuring she can share this knowledge with her community now and in the future.

programme.title: Heartland Waterfowl
programme.desc: The Award-Winning Heartland Waterfowl is a team of men from the Midwest that travels across the US and Canada to film honest waterfowl hunting experiences. With a variety of personalities, these hunting buddies pursue waterfowl hunting with hard work and a dedication to scouting, while showcasing their efforts with the highest standard of production quality.

programme.title: Man Eats Wild
programme.desc: Mario teams up with good friend and precision rifle expert Bernard and heads into the high alpine mountains above New Zealand's rugged West Coast in search of tahr; drawing on his Greek roots, Mario cooks a rustic Kleftiko dish in an earth oven.

programme.title: Whitetail Fix
programme.desc: A team of God-loving individuals, from different walks of life, different backgrounds and different jobs that all share one common bond: The passion and desire to achieve their Whitetail Fix!

programme.title: Relentless Pursuit
programme.desc: Tim Wells hosts episode after episode featuring incredible shots on everything from hogs to frogs.

programme.title: Pigman: The Series
programme.desc: Brian Pigman Quaca is a true-blue original—an unapologetic, high-energy host with a larger-than-life personality that has redefined outdoor television. With an unrelenting passion for the chase, Pigman takes on the world's toughest hunts, using any legal means necessary to put game on the ground. While his reputation was built on hardcore hog hunting, don't be mistaken—his skills extend far beyond

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: Steve hunts for Osceola Turkeys in Florida with Janis Putelis and Richard Martinez.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: Steve joins Kimi Werner and Cameron Kirkconnell for a spearfishing adventure in the Bahamas.

programme.title: Jim Shockey's: The Professionals
programme.desc: Hiking and hunting in Nepal.

programme.title: Crossroads With the Burtons
programme.desc: NASCAR O Reilly Auto Parts Series driver Jeb Burton and his father, NASCAR legend Ward Burton, take viewers beyond the checkered flag in Crossroads with the Burtons, where the excitement of racing meets a lifelong passion for hunting, conservation and the great outdoors.

programme.title: Roger Raglin Outdoors
programme.desc: Join host Roger Raglin for one exciting whitetail adventure after another. Roger Raglin Outdoors features all big game but is predominantly whitetail hunting utilizing a variety of hunting methods: bow, rifle and black powder. As a true outdoorsman and an exceptional big game hunter, Roger shares a lifetime of tricks and techniques to help you in your quest for big game.
